10. We know that Beverage:mirinda is somewhere between Sport:badminton and Beverage:juice. Since blueberry is to the right of Transport:ship and Beverage:mirinda is mentioned, it cannot be in the position of Sport:badminton or Beverage:juice.
11. We know that Sport:soccer == Job:photographer or Sport:soccer == Music-Genre:dubstep, but not both. Since blueberry is not in the position of Sport:soccer or Music-Genre:dubstep, it cannot be in the position of Job:photographer or Music-Genre:dubstep.

13. We know that Beverage:soy-milk is in an even position. Since blueberry is not in the position of Beverage:soy-milk, it cannot be in an even position.

Based on the given premises, we cannot definitively determine the job of the person who has blueberry.
